essence: Designs parts and processes for additive manufacturing, optimising for strength, cost, and manufacturability.

identity.title: Additive Manufacturing Engineer
identity.summary: Develops AM process parameters, designs for additive manufacturing (DfAM), and scales prototypes into production.

salary.notes: Engineers with metal AM and aerospace experience are particularly well compensated.

qualifications: Degree in mechanical engineering, materials, or related field
Experience with DfAM, topology optimisation, and process development
Familiarity with AM hardware and materials

lifestyle.description: Combines lab development, simulation, and production scaling. Close collaboration with design, materials, and quality teams.

habits: Designs parts optimised for additive processes
Validates parts and performs failure analysis
Works with suppliers to qualify materials
